CVE-2020-8169.title: curl: partial password leak over DNS on HTTP redirect
CVE-2020-8169.description: curl 7.62.0 through 7.70.0 is vulnerable to an information disclosure vulnerability.

CVE-2021-22876.title: curl: Automatic referer leaks credentials
CVE-2021-22876.description: curl does not strip off user credentials from the URL when automatically populating the Referer: HTTP request header field.
